summary: Enabled root strict TypeScript, ESLint, Prettier, and architecture boundary gates with a self-test fixture for forbidden sim-core dependencies.

All matched package/config/tools architecture files use Prettier code style.
ESLint passed for apps, packages, tools, and root lint config files.

VALID project/messages/outbox/FOUNDATION-002__MSG-20260623-FOUNDATION-002-SYSTEMS-REVIEW__systems_architect.json; final schema validation was rerun after recording this result.

decisions: Implemented root-level quality gates directly in package.json so they do not rely on existing package-level hello placeholder scripts.
Added development-only toolchain dependencies for TypeScript, ESLint, TypeScript ESLint, Prettier, Node types, and lint globals; no production dependency was added.
The architecture checker treats current packages/core and future packages/sim-core as sim-core boundary subjects for the M0 dependency rule.
risks: Existing package-level hello scripts remain in package manifests because package manifests other than the root are outside this task's allowed paths.
The boundary checker covers the current M0 package/dependency rules and should be expanded as additional packages from docs/04-software-architecture.md are scaffolded.
requested_action: Review strict TypeScript, lint, format, lockfile, and architecture boundary gate implementation for FOUNDATION-002.
